summary: US-845 integration release gate passed. Spexus current_context was read before get_task for PERSONAL-TASK-1167. Exact dependency reports for MZ-501 through MZ-506 were present and matched the requested paths; each required report contains the required fields, successful/accepted status, risks=[], and failure_type=not_applicable. MZ-501 defined the desktop/laptop table-state QA design, MZ-502 implemented the desktop table UI, MZ-503 added US-scoped integration tests, MZ-504 accepted accessibility applicability and review, MZ-505 visual regression was accepted by fix-2 plus attempt-3, and MZ-506 accepted component regression verification. AC-2428 and AC-2429 both have pass evidence through source/test/report review and screenshot artifacts. MZ-505 override risk is closed in orchestrator-log.json with closure_report task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1165/attempt-3.json and supporting fix-2 evidence. Screenshot evidence is correctly classified as synthetic/static frontend UI fixture evidence, not backend-live evidence. Release readiness is satisfied for this static desktop table UI scope with recorded npm run verify/build evidence, visual screenshot evidence, accessibility applicability, regression scope, NFR classification, and no tutorial/glossary/full-mobile/backend/security/migration obligations.

tests_run.evidence: Read active Spexus tenant/project/component scope before reading any Spexus artifact; active project was PERSONAL and active component was default.

Confirmed task [MZ-507] US-845 integration release gate under epic PERSONAL-EP-180, refs PERSONAL-US-845 / PERSONAL-REQ-1762 / PERSONAL-AC-2428 / PERSONAL-AC-2429, release-readiness layer, QA risk high, release gate required.
Confirmed the worktree contains prior task changes and generated artifacts; this verifier did not modify production code.

tests_run.command: rg --files task-reports output/playwright docs/test-design src/ui src/test
tests_run.evidence: Confirmed the exact dependency report paths, US-845 source/test artifacts, MZ-505 capture script, capture results, and regenerated screenshots are present.

tests_run.command: jq full inspection of task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1161/attempt-1.json through task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1166/attempt-1.json, including task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1165/fix-2.json and task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1165/attempt-3.json
tests_run.evidence: Validated exact report paths and required fields: task_id, epic_id, status, summary, files_changed, tests_run, risks, failure_type, verification_environment, plus evidence_matrix and quality_gate_matrix for verification/release gates. Dependency reports have risks=[] and failure_type=not_applicable.

Confirmed MZ-505 attempt-2 product_gap was routed under an explicit override, downstream closure evidence was required, routed_risks status is closed, and closure_report is task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1165/attempt-3.json.

tests_run.command: sed/rg source inspection of docs/test-design/us-845-desktop-table-states.md, src/ui/render.ts, src/styles.css, src/ui/render.test.ts, src/ui/controller.test.ts, src/test/us845DesktopTable.integration.test.ts, and output/playwright/mz505-capture.mjs
tests_run.evidence: Confirmed QA design and implementation cover desktop/laptop table states, state context, legal actions, hands/trick, score/result panels, contract-order compact grid, accessible labels/aria/focus-visible behavior, and no tutorial/glossary/full-mobile scope expansion.

Confirmed 14 result entries, six captured state families for desktop and laptop plus console entries; captured states have horizontalOverflow=false and evidence_classification=synthetic_static_visual_ui_evidence. Contract actionAreaRect.bottom is 581.08 desktop and 573.00 laptop; settlement/final result panels remain within the visible table area.

tests_run.command: visual inspection of output/playwright/mz-505-contract-laptop.png, mz-505-settlement-laptop.png, mz-505-final-laptop.png, and mz-505-play-desktop.png
tests_run.evidence: Confirmed compact contract-order actions are fully visible; settlement/final result panels are readable; desktop play shows score panel, state rail, current trick, hand cards, and legal card affordances.

verification_environment.evidence_classification: Screenshots are synthetic/static frontend UI evidence rendered through the local Vite app with deterministic GameState fixtures; they are not backend-live evidence.

commands_not_rerun.reason: Same-day dependency reports after the final MZ-505 fix record npm run verify passing with Vitest, TypeScript compilation, and Vite build. Report/source/screenshot evidence was sufficient for the release gate.
MZ-505 fix-2 regenerated the exact screenshot and capture-result artifacts required by the release gate; this verifier inspected those artifacts instead of rerunning browser capture.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Release gate must validate exact dependency reports and required fields without inferring report attempts.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Report review validates recorded evidence and structure; no live backend behavior exists for this static UI scope.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Desktop table UI shows current phase, active actor, legal human actions, player hands, score table, contract/trump/current trick where applicable, deal result, and final result.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Frontend UI/source/test/screenshot evidence only; no backend service is involved.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Bidding, contract/order, whist/check, play, deal-result, and final-result desktop/laptop states are understandable, expose the correct legal action model, and do not block normal play.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Integration evidence is Vitest/jsdom plus deterministic renderer output; visual evidence uses static fixtures.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Deal-result and next-deal states make the outcome understandable and allow proceeding only when the bullet is not complete; final result exposes no continuation controls.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Next-deal is covered by jsdom/integration evidence rather than a dedicated MZ-505 screenshot family.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Desktop/laptop table-state QA design exists and routes downstream implementation, integration, accessibility, visual, regression, and release gate work.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Design report itself is planning evidence; downstream reports provide runtime/source/test/visual proof.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Presentation-client renderer and styles implement state-context clarity, score/result surfaces, legal actions, and compact contract-order layout without domain/scoring changes.
evidence_matrix.limitations: MZ-502 visual screenshot proof is supplied downstream by MZ-505.

evidence_matrix.scenario: US-845 integration tests cover representative desktop state families and legal action projection.
evidence_matrix.limitations: The report classifies these as in-process engine plus renderer integration, not browser viewport automation.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Desktop/laptop table UI is keyboard/action usable and assistive-technology-readable for the static UI scope.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Accessibility evidence is source and deterministic DOM/test review, not a manual screen-reader transcript.

evidence_matrix.req_or_ac_or_contract: MZ-505 visual regression and override closure
evidence_matrix.scenario: The visual release blocker from MZ-505 attempt 2 is closed by fix-2 and accepted by attempt 3 with no routed risk remaining open.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Closure evidence is synthetic/static frontend UI screenshot and metric evidence plus recorded automated tests.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Default component desktop table experience is verified end to end across implementation, integration, accessibility, visual, and release-readiness evidence.
evidence_matrix.limitations: MZ-506 accepted recorded same-day dependency evidence rather than rerunning all commands.

evidence_matrix.scenario: US-845 release readiness does not add tutorial, glossary, full-mobile UX, backend, security, persistence, migration, or observability obligations.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: docs/test-design/us-845-desktop-table-states.md; task reports MZ-501..MZ-506; src/ui/render.ts; src/styles.css; src/ui/render.test.ts; src/test/us845DesktopTable.integration.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Existing responsive CSS remains present, but US-845 evidence and implementation scope are desktop/laptop table states.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: Exact dependency report paths listed in the verifier prompt
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: The context-only premature US gate report was reviewed only as superseded evidence and not relied on for final closure.
Vitest/jsdom engine plus renderer integration, not live browser/backend evidence.
No manual screen-reader transcript; accepted source and DOM/test accessibility evidence.
Screenshots are deterministic frontend UI fixtures and not backend-live evidence.
Accepted dependency/source/visual evidence and did not rerun full verification.
Closure evidence proves static UI layout/action visibility, not backend behavior.
Visual states are synthetic fixtures; integration states are jsdom/in-process renderer tests.
Next-deal state is covered by jsdom/integration evidence rather than a dedicated screenshot family.
Release evidence is local repo test/build plus static visual gate evidence.
Applicable NFRs are accessibility, visual layout, regression, and release readiness for static desktop UI.
Full-mobile UX, tutorial, and glossary/help are explicitly out of scope; backend/security/migration obligations are not applicable.
All screenshot evidence is synthetic/static frontend UI evidence from deterministic GameState fixtures.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: US-845 static presentation-client UI rendering/style/test/screenshot scope
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No auth, backend, network, persistence schema, migration, or sensitive-data path is touched.
